METIS Data Items
================

All ``DataItem`` subclasses specific to the METIS instrument.
For a human-oriented reference with FITS schema tables, see
:doc:`../data_formats/data_item_catalog`.

.. automodule:: pymetis.instruments.metis.dataitems
   :members:
   :undoc-members:
   :show-inheritance:

Detector calibration
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
